---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem/Use Case

What problem does this feature solve? Why is it needed?

## Proposed Solution

How should this feature work? Describe the API and behavior.

```typescript
// Example of how the feature would be used
import { newFeature } from 'react-use-anywhere';

// Usage example
```

## Alternatives Considered

What alternative solutions or features have you considered?

## Benefits

Who would benefit from this feature? How would it improve the library?

## Potential Drawbacks

Are there any potential downsides or concerns?

## Implementation Ideas

If you have ideas about how to implement this, please share them.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request.
